name: Crazy Pixel Apocalypse 4 UI 2026
description: Crazy Pixel Apocalypse 4 UI 2026 is a fast multiplayer shooting game with pixel-style action, survival battles, weapons, and online rooms. Choose your server, create a match, fight other players, and test your aim across intense maps. The game mixes classic FPS movement with simple controls, quick rounds, and chaotic gun battles made for browser play. Web Dev https://www.insanegamesonline.com/
instructions: Mouse to aim click to shoot WASD to move Space to jump and tap buttons on mobile
